case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ESTENIA YAMILETH MARTINEZ AQUINO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AQUINO, ESTENIA YAMILETH MARTINEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AQUINO, ESTENIA YAMILETH MARTINEZ $587.59 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $672.59, ON DELINQUENT LOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $587.59 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AQUINO, ESTENIA YAMILETH MARTINEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED FEB-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AQUINO, ESTENIA YAMILETH MARTINEZ
